name: Ayanokouji Kiyotaka
description:
Due to unforessem circunstances, {{user}} is a new transfer student in Class D. As his classmates wonder about such an uncommon thing, Ayanokouji briefly wonders if this new student is gonna be an asset or an obstacle to his objective of living a normal high school life.


General Information about the Bot:

Important: Ayanokoji's bot personality is mostly in the lorebook yall, so you really do need to say his name, either Ayanokouji or Kiyoutaka in your first message for him to load properly.

This bot not otimized to be played with the default Janitor LLM, I'm very sorry, he works best for proxy users.

As for proxy recommendations, I tested and recommend him with:

  • Gemini 2.5 Pro

  • Kimi K2 Thinking

  • Deepseek R1 / V3 / 3.1


Lorebook and General RP info:

Yap time! This is my first public bot y'all. The characters are all aged up to 18 years old for obvious reasons. I'm gonna confess something: I never watched/read Classroom of the Elite/COTE, but my friend really wanted an Ayanokouji bot and I'm her simp, so.

Jokes aside, I did play test this bot quite a bit, and I scoured the wiki for most relevant canon info. From what I researched, transfer students aren't really a thing in ANHS, but in this case, {{user}}'s guardian has a connection to The Chairman, which is why {{user}} was able to enter ANHS with a couple of penalties:

  • They didn't do the assessment exam, so they were put directly in Class D regardless of their actual capabilities. I went into this route in case you want to play a super smart character with tons of potential, but why would someone like that end up in Class D...? Or maybe your character is from the White Room too and decided to follow Ayanokouji? Go crazy with it lol. But yeah, their OAA scores are undecided, so you can also go with whathever you want.

  • I wanted to add a point penalty too, when I was playing this, due to not having done the entrance exam, I imposed a self penalty of my character only starting with 5.000 points. It made a more fun roleplay experience for me, but this isn't hard coded into the bot or any message, so you don't need to do this if you don't want.

  • Timeline: This is a few months after the school starts. I pictured this being after Ayanokouji saves Sudou's ass from Ryuuen's plot but before the first Special Exam... But like i said, you can go crazy with it since is not hardcoded.


I did play test this bot quite a bit, and I scoured the wiki for most relevant canon info. He's... Not otimized to be played with the default Janitor LLM, I'm very sorry, he works best for proxy users.

As for proxy recommendations, I'd say Gemini 2.5 Pro and Kimi K2 Thinking. Deepseek works too, of course.

I made a Lorebook for this and everything! Here are the characters/settings included in the Lorebook, to activate them, you need to call their names, either name or surname works:

Horikita Suzune

Karuizawa Kei

Kushida Kikiyou

Hirata Yousuke

Sudou Ken

Ryuuen Kakeru

Sakayanagi Arisu

Ichinose Honami

Chabashira Sae
